audience_policies.source_phrase: (PRINTABLE) Pass allows half-price admission for up to 3 people. Children under 1 year are free. FOR NEEDHAM RESIDENTS ONLY. This pass admits 3 visitors at 1/2 price admission per person; any additional visitors must pay the regular admission price.
